one_time_description: Royalties revenue of $1,000,000 (non-recurring, not in prior year or budget)
economic_notes: Band operates Ecolink Forest Services Ltd., Alkali Resource Management Ltd., Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises LP (50% partner), and Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. Band also operates Alkali Enterprises store. Pension plan contributions of $211,284 made during year.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Three business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Ecolink Forest Services Ltd., Alkali Resource Management Ltd., and Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises LP. Band became 50% limited partner in CAFE LP during the year. $1,000,000 royalties revenue appears non-recurring (zero in prior year and budget). FN Drinking Water Settlement of $500,000 also appears one-time. Total government transfers calculated as ISC Operating + ISC Capital + FNHA + CMHC + CCATEC + Dept of Justice + DFO + Natural Resources + FNESC + Province of BC + New Relationship Trust. Silviculture responsibility of $1,784,884 included in liabilities. Net financial assets per balance sheet $17,168,471. Comparative balance sheet shows beginning net financial assets of $14,031,404 but statement of changes shows $14,003,053 — minor discrepancy in source document. No schedule of remuneration disclosed.
